# AdminForth

> AdminForth is an agent-first open-source admin panel framework for building customizable back-office apps. This file curates the core tutorial documentation as clean markdown sources for LLM consumption.

Use this file as the primary map for implementation, customization, adapters, plugins, CLI usage, deployment, and advanced integration patterns.

## Core Tutorial
- [Getting Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/001-gettingStarted.md): Getting Started tutorial page.
- [Hello world app without CLI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/01-helloWorld.md): Hello world app without CLI tutorial page.
- [Glossary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/02-glossary.md): Glossary tutorial page.
- [Deploy in Docker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/04-deploy.md): Deploy in Docker tutorial page.
- [CLI Commands](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/06-CLICommands.md): CLI Commands tutorial page.
- [Usage of the logger](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/07-UsageOfLogger.md): Usage of the logger tutorial page.

## Customization
- [Branding and Theming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/01-branding.md): Branding and Theming tutorial page.
- [Custom record field rendering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/02-customFieldRendering.md): Custom record field rendering tutorial page.
- [Virtual columns](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/03-virtualColumns.md): Virtual columns tutorial page.
- [Hooks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/04-hooks.md): Hooks tutorial page.
- [Limiting actions access](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/05-limitingAccess.md): Limiting actions access tutorial page.
- [Custom pages](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/06-customPages.md): Custom pages tutorial page.
- [Alerts and confirmations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/07-alert.md): Alerts and confirmations tutorial page.
- [Page Injections](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/08-pageInjections.md): Page Injections tutorial page.
- [Actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/09-Actions.md): Actions tutorial page.
- [Menu & Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/10-menuConfiguration.md): Menu & Header tutorial page.
- [Data API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/11-dataApi.md): Data API tutorial page.
- [Security](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/12-security.md): Security tutorial page.
- [Standard pages tuning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/13-standardPagesTuning.md): Standard pages tuning tutorial page.
- [AdminForth Components Library](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/15-afcl.md): AdminForth Components Library tutorial page.
- [Websocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/03-Customization/16-websocket.md): Websocket tutorial page.

- [Image Generation Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/03-image-generation-adapters.md): Image Generation Adapters tutorial page.
- [Storage Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/04-storage-adapters.md): Storage Adapters tutorial page.
- [AI Completion Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/05-ai-completion-adapters.md): AI Completion Adapters tutorial page.
- [Image Analysis Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/06-image-analysis-adapters.md): Image Analysis Adapters tutorial page.
- [Key-value Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/07-key-value-adapters.md): Key-value Adapters tutorial page.
- [Captcha Adapters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/08-captcha-adapters.md): Captcha Adapters tutorial page.
- [Telegram Chat Surface Adapter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/05-Adapters/09-chat-surface-adapters.md): Telegram Chat Surface Adapter tutorial page.

## Plugins
- [Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/01-agent.md): Agent tutorial page.
- [Two-Factor Authentication Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/02-TwoFactorsAuth.md): Two-Factor Authentication Plugin tutorial page.
- [Foreign Inline List](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/03-ForeignInlineList.md): Foreign Inline List tutorial page.
- [Audit Log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/04-AuditLog.md): Audit Log tutorial page.
- [Upload](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/05-0-upload.md): Upload tutorial page.
- [Upload API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/05-1-upload-api.md): Upload API tutorial page.
- [Markdown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/06-markdown.md): Markdown tutorial page.
- [Email Password Reset](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/07-email-password-reset.md): Email Password Reset tutorial page.
- [Import Export](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/08-import-export.md): Import Export tutorial page.
- [Open Signup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/09-open-signup.md): Open Signup tutorial page.
- [Internationalization (i18n)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/10-i18n.md): Internationalization (i18n) tutorial page.
- [OAuth Authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/11-oauth.md): OAuth Authentication tutorial page.
- [Inline Create](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/12-inline-create.md): Inline Create tutorial page.
- [List In-Place Edit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/13-list-in-place-edit.md): List In-Place Edit tutorial page.
- [Text Complete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/14-text-complete.md): Text Complete tutorial page.
- [Foreign Inline Show](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/15-ForeignInlineShow.md): Foreign Inline Show tutorial page.
- [Email Invite](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/16-email-invite.md): Email Invite tutorial page.
- [Bulk AI Flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/17-bulk-ai-flow.md): Bulk AI Flow tutorial page.
- [Universal Search (Legacy)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/18-universal-filters.md): Universal Search (Legacy) tutorial page.
- [Login Captcha](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/19-login-captcha.md): Login Captcha tutorial page.
- [User Soft Delete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/20-user-soft-delete.md): User Soft Delete tutorial page.
- [Clone Row](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/21-clone-row.md): Clone Row tutorial page.
- [Many to Many](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/22-many2many.md): Many to Many tutorial page.
- [Background Jobs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/23-background-jobs.md): Background Jobs tutorial page.
- [Quick Filters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/24-quick-filters.md): Quick Filters tutorial page.
- [Auto Remove Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/25-auto-remove.md): Auto Remove Plugin tutorial page.
- [Rich Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/08-Plugins/26-RichEditor.md): Rich Editor tutorial page.

## Advanced
- [Plugin development guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/09-Advanced/01-plugin-development.md): Plugin development guide tutorial page.

## Optional
- [Glossary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/02-glossary.md): Reference terminology; useful but not always required for implementation.
- [Usage of Logger](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devforth/adminforth/main/adminforth/documentation/docs/tutorial/07-UsageOfLogger.md): Logging integration and patterns; useful for observability-focused tasks.
